description: User authentication, identity management, and authorization services (login, SSO, MFA, OAuth).

entries.name: Auth0
entries.summary: Identity platform handling login, SSO, MFA, and social auth via SDKs and a hosted login flow.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for up to 25,000 monthly active users (consumer use case).

entries.name: Clerk
entries.summary: Drop-in authentication and user management with pre-built UI components for React/Next.js and others.
entries.paidFrom: Pro plan from $25/month + per-MAU pricing beyond included users.

entries.name: Firebase Auth
entries.summary: Google's identity platform supporting email/password, phone, and social logins (Google, GitHub, Facebook, etc.).
entries.freeTier: Unlimited free for most providers; phone auth free up to 10k verifications/month.

entries.name: Supabase Auth
entries.summary: Open-source auth built on PostgreSQL with row-level security, included as part of the Supabase platform.
entries.freeTier: 50,000 monthly active users free on Supabase's free project tier.

entries.name: WorkOS
entries.summary: Enterprise-ready auth APIs (SSO, SCIM, audit logs) designed for B2B SaaS selling into large organizations.
entries.freeTier: Free up to 1 million monthly active users for core user management.

entries.name: Okta / Auth0 by Okta
entries.summary: Enterprise identity and access management platform for workforce and customer identity.
entries.freeTier: Developer Edition free for testing, limited MAUs.
entries.paidFrom: Workforce Identity plans billed per user.

entries.name: Duo Security
entries.summary: Two-factor authentication (2FA/MFA) for apps, VPNs, and infrastructure logins.
entries.freeTier: Free for up to 10 users, all auth methods, hardware token support included.

entries.name: Foxpass
entries.summary: Hosted LDAP and RADIUS for per-user logins across servers, VPNs, and Wi-Fi networks.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for small teams (limited users).

entries.name: Ory
entries.summary: Open-source identity infrastructure (Kratos, Hydra, Keto) with a managed cloud option for auth, OAuth2, and permissions.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited monthly active users on Ory Network; self-hosted OSS is free.
entries.paidFrom: Production plan billed per MAU beyond free quota.

entries.name: Stytch
entries.summary: API-first authentication platform specializing in passwordless, passkeys, and fraud/risk signals.
entries.freeTier: Free tier covering limited monthly active users.
entries.paidFrom: Growth plan billed per MAU beyond free quota.
